title: The Bihar Reorganisation Act, 2000
full_text: The Bihar Reorganisation Act, 2000 बिहार पुनर्गठन अधिनियम, 2000 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 200030 Act Number: 30 Enactment Date: 2000-08-25 Act Year: 2000 Short Title: The Bihar Reorganisation Act, 2000 Hindi Title: बिहार पुनर्गठन अधिनियम, 2000 Long Title: An Act to provide for the reorganisation of the existing State of Bihar and for matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of States Enforcement Date: 15-11-2000 Notification: 15th November, 2000, vide notification No. S.O. 829(E), dated 14th September, 2000, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). Section 87. Power to name authorities, etc., for exercising statutory functions. Section 88. Legal proceedings. Section 89. Transfer of pending proceedings. Section 90. Right of pleaders to practise in certain cases. Section 91. Effect of provisions of the Act inconsistent with other laws. Section 92. Power to remove difficulties. Schedule 1.
